world_news.headline: Australia news live: Penny Wong wins jet fuel pledge from China in Beijing visit; US lawmaker says Aukus price might go up
world_news.summary:
Foreign affairs minister says China has agreed to facilitate exports of jet fuel to ease supply disruptions. Follow today’s news live

An interim report by the antisemitism royal commissioner Virginia Bell is expected to be released on Thursday.

Bell was appointed to lead the royal commission after the Bondi terror attack, and her interim report is expected to focus on intelligence and law enforcement agencies.

I don’t think the US$3bn number, which is in the optimal pathway, is the 10 commandments. I think that as this enterprise unfolds,there may be a rationale for Australia to participate more,but, as I said, at this point, the commitment of US$3bn, [and] already the transmittal [sic] of US$2bn of that commitment is something that most people, certainly on Capitol Hill, still remark and comment very favourably and appreciate.

world_news.headline: Austrian 'lucky loser' makes WTA Tour history at Madrid Open
world_news.summary: Anastasia Potapova experiences an "explosion of emotions", as her remarkable run in Madrid continues at the prestigious tournament.

world_news.headline: What’s behind Israel’s plan to move the Bnei Menashe?
world_news.summary: The new wave of the Bnei Menashe community from Northeast India have arrived in Israel under a 2026 government plan.

world_news.headline: Comey surrenders over charge of threatening Trump's life in Instagram post
world_news.summary: Prosecutors say a 2025 seashell photo posted by the former FBI director was a call for violence against Trump.

world_news.headline: Oil price briefly hits $120 after reports of 'extended' Iran blockade
world_news.summary: The price of crude oil has swung sharply as uncertainty over the war in the Middle East continues.

world_news.headline: Ukraine asks Israel to seize ship carrying grain ‘stolen’ by Russia
world_news.summary: Kyiv requested that Israel seize the vessel and its cargo, take grain ‌samples, and question crew ​members.

world_news.headline: Musk accuses Altman of betraying OpenAI’s nonprofit founding mission
world_news.summary: OpenAI’s lawyers argue Musk’s lawsuit aims to undermine the company for his competing venture, xAI.

world_news.headline: Comey's seashell post got him indicted. But experts are sceptical the government can win
world_news.summary: Acting AG Todd Blanche said the case was investigated for months, adding "it's serious when you threaten the president."

world_news.headline: Mali’s Tuareg rebels say Russian fighters must withdraw from country
world_news.summary: As military government battles to reassert control, spokesperson for Tuareg rebels says it will fall 'sooner or later'.

world_news.headline: Syria trial seen as first step on long road for Assad's victims
